label: Terrain patch maker
description: Generates terrain patches on a map using Perlin noise, applying each TerrainThreshold layer where the noise value falls within its range.

thresholds.label: Thresholds
thresholds.description: Ordered list of terrain layers applied based on Perlin noise value ranges.

perlinFrequency.label: Perlin frequency
perlinFrequency.description: Spatial frequency of the Perlin noise. Higher values produce smaller, more frequent patches.

perlinLacunarity.label: Perlin lacunarity
perlinLacunarity.description: Frequency multiplier applied at each successive Perlin octave.

perlinPersistence.label: Perlin persistence
perlinPersistence.description: Amplitude multiplier applied at each successive Perlin octave. Controls how much detail each octave adds.

perlinOctaves.label: Perlin octaves
perlinOctaves.description: Number of Perlin noise octaves summed together. More octaves produce more detailed patches.

minFertility.label: Min fertility
minFertility.description: Minimum base-terrain fertility required for this patch maker to place terrain on a cell.

maxFertility.label: Max fertility
maxFertility.description: Maximum base-terrain fertility at which this patch maker places terrain on a cell.

minSize.label: Min size
minSize.description: Minimum number of connected cells required before a generated patch is committed to the map.

isPond.label: Is pond
isPond.description: When true, treats generated patches as ponds for water-body classification purposes.
